'''鈭歞h-y-y-sh''' ('''kadhayeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jabble|jabble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jabble|jabble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-y-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadhayeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhayeshoko|thidhayeshoko]] || [[word:jidhayeshoko|jidhayeshoko]] || [[word:shidhayeshoko|shidhayeshoko]] || [[word:kidhayeshoko|kidhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhayeshoko|thuthudhayeshoko]] || [[word:jujudhayeshoko|jujudhayeshoko]] || [[word:shushudhayeshoko|shushudhayeshoko]] || [[word:kukudhayeshoko|kukudhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhayeshoko|thudhayeshoko]] || [[word:judhayeshoko|judhayeshoko]] || [[word:shudhayeshoko|shudhayeshoko]] || [[word:kudhayeshoko|kudhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhayeshoko|thudhayeshoko]] || [[word:judhayeshoko|judhayeshoko]] || [[word:shudhayeshoko|shudhayeshoko]] || [[word:kudhayeshoko|kudhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhayeshoko|thedhayeshoko]] || [[word:jedhayeshoko|jedhayeshoko]] || [[word:shedhayeshoko|shedhayeshoko]] || [[word:kedhayeshoko|kedhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhayeshoko|thothodhayeshoko]] || [[word:jojodhayeshoko|jojodhayeshoko]] || [[word:shoshodhayeshoko|shoshodhayeshoko]] || [[word:kokodhayeshoko|kokodhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhayeshoko|thodhayeshoko]] || [[word:jodhayeshoko|jodhayeshoko]] || [[word:shodhayeshoko|shodhayeshoko]] || [[word:kodhayeshoko|kodhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhayeshoko|thodhayeshoko]] || [[word:jodhayeshoko|jodhayeshoko]] || [[word:shodhayeshoko|shodhayeshoko]] || [[word:kodhayeshoko|kodhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhayeshoko|th忙dhayeshoko]] || [[word:j忙dhayeshoko|j忙dhayeshoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhayeshoko|sh忙dhayeshoko]] || [[word:k忙dhayeshoko|k忙dhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhayeshoko|thathadhayeshoko]] || [[word:jajadhayeshoko|jajadhayeshoko]] || [[word:shashadhayeshoko|shashadhayeshoko]] || [[word:kakadhayeshoko|kakadhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhayeshoko|thadhayeshoko]] || [[word:jadhayeshoko|jadhayeshoko]] || [[word:shadhayeshoko|shadhayeshoko]] || [[word:kadhayeshoko|kadhayeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhayeshoko|thadhayeshoko]] || [[word:jadhayeshoko|jadhayeshoko]] || [[word:shadhayeshoko|shadhayeshoko]] || [[word:kadhayeshoko|kadhayeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhayeshithi|shadhayeshithi]] || [[word:shadhayeshiji|shadhayeshiji]] || [[word:shadhayeshishi|shadhayeshishi]] || [[word:shadhayeshiki|shadhayeshiki]]
